steps.description: Base extrusion of the lens/diamond-shaped closed profile. Overall width 32.25 in, inside height 14.00 in (7.00 per half), angled flats at 15 deg TYP, extruded to 4.00 in depth. Sheet metal wall 0.060 in (16 GA) suggests thin-walled shell construction.
steps.notes: POSITION ASSUMED (drawing frame: rect corner at origin / circle at plate center) - verify against the drawing.

steps.description: .218 DR. THRU holes along a row at 0.50 in from bottom edge on the side face. Spacing and quantity to suit — not specified in drawing.
steps.notes: HOLE POSITIONS ASSUMED (centered on the plate envelope) - verify against the drawing.
Run last. Interactive edge selection (values from the drawing are baked in).

steps.description: Rebuild, mass properties, bounding box, save
One macro that runs every step in order (paste once, F5)
steps.notes: Single-run alternative to the numbered macros. Fillets/chamfers still need interactive edge selection.
